title: Scotchbonnet-Saute-Jamaica
description: This citrusy and crunchy midnight craving dish features scotch bonnet peppers for a spicy kick.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: Ensure the temperature is safe for cooking scotch bonnet peppers.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh citrus segments (orange or grapefruit)
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use freshly squeezed juices and segments for maximum flavor.

ingredients.name: 2 scotch bonnet peppers, seeded and finely chopped

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the finely chopped scotch bonnet peppers and sauté for an additional 2-3 minutes or until fragrant.
Stir in the allspice and salt. Cook for another minute to distribute spices evenly.
Squeeze the citrus segments into the skillet, mashing gently with a spoon to release juices.
Simmer for about 5 more minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Serve hot as a snack or appetizer.
